MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-ANCIENT_URN.descr: Whenever you exhaust a card, add it to the hand of a random teammate
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-ANCIENT_URN.flavo: Why waste it when you can give it to a friend?
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-ANCIENT_URN.title: Ancient Urn
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-GIFT_THAT_KEEPS_O: At the start of your turn draw until your hand is full, all your teammates draw 2 fewer cards at the start of their turns
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-MINION_FACTORY.de: Whenever you transform a card into a minion card, a random teammate also transforms a card in their hand into that card
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-MINION_FACTORY.fl: Now I can use them however I want!
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-BONE_SHIELD.descr: Osty now divides half of the damage received among teammates
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-BONE_SHIELD.title: Bone Shield
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-PRODUCTION_BELT.d: Whenever you create a status card, give it to a random teammate instead
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-PRODUCTION_BELT.f: What am I supposed to do with this!?
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-HYDRAHEAD.descrip: Obtain a class specific multiplayer relic
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-HYDRAHEAD.flavor: Don't worry it will grow back in a day
MULTIPLAYERSHENANIGENS-HYDRAHEAD.title: Hydrahead
